Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.

Appearances: Josh Voorhees of the Chanler Group (510.848.8880) for plaintiff Whitney Leeman; Lee N. Smith of Weintraub Tobin Chediak Coleman Grodin (916.558.6000) appearing via Court Call for defendant Farmer Bros.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Granted. Order and Judgment signed in court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Notice Of Joinder In Pltf'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgemnt

Appearances: Josh Voorhees of the Chanler Group (510.848.8880) for plaintiff Whitney Leeman; Lee N. Smith of Weintraub Tobin Chediak Coleman Grodin (916.558.6000) appearing via Court Call for defendant Farmer Bros.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's Motion to Approve Prop. 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
